rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KEITH H. HOPKINSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VALERIA ULFELDER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/01/2022 for the same issues. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. The judicial officer will not approve a petition for final distribution that includes a petition to approve settlement. This petition must be amended to only request approval of a settlement agreement then a fully noticed petition for final distribution will have to be filed. Petitions to approve a settlement agreement must be filed separately and prior to any petition seeking distribution based on the terms of the settlement agreement and must include the following: 1) A citation to the Probate Code section under which the petition is presented; 2) The legal standard governing the petition; 3) A summary of the key terms of the settlement agreement; and 4) A statement regarding the parties' understanding of what they believe court approval means. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 10/24/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues on the amended petition to include: a. Proof of Publication has not been filed. b. Notice of Petition to Administer Estate has not been filed. c. Maria Mercedes Lopez Iglesias's and Maria Luisa Lopez Iglesias' addresses that are listed in Item 8 are different from the addresses that were listed by competing petitioner in her petition filed on 2/18/22. d. Item 5b is incomplete. e. Jose Valentin Mendioroz, Decedent's brother, is alleged to be deceased (date of death unknown), but no other information is given, including whether he has any issue or successors in interest. f. Filed stamped copy of petition and revised proposed order have not been submitted. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOSEPH MUSCAT SEPARATE PROPERTY TRUST OF 2005
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine The Validity Of The February 25, 2019 Amendment And Restatement Of The Joseph Muscat Separate Property Trust Of 2005, For Accounting, And For Damages For Financial Elder Abuse Under The Welfare And Institution Code; For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/02/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. Continued again for same issues. Matter may on on for hearing on 11/2/2022 to take the petition off calendar for failure to give and file notice. Petitioner must give and file 30 day's notice. File stamped single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a file stamped courtesy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. File stamped courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. A hard copy of the proposed order must be provided to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE IRREVOCABLE HOUSING TRUST FOR ANDREW JR HEWITSON TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee, Waiver Of Bond, Determination Of Sole Beneficiary And Distribution Of Trust Asset To Beneficiary
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/22/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Please explain and provide legal basis for venue being San Francisco as it appears the venue would be Los Angeles based on the address listed in the petition for Schwab. (Probate Code 17005 (b).) 2) Please explain where Petitioner Andrew Hewitson lives. The address for notice for Andrew Hewitson is listed as 5624 California Street, Apt. 3 San Francisco, CA 94121. The verification was signed in Austin Texas. 3) Notice must be re-done and include the language required by local rule 14.1. D. 4) Please list all names and addresses for all heirs of Douglas Alexander Hewitson. 5) Please file a copy of the document/evidence showing that Petitioner is the beneficiary named in the title of the Trust on the Schwab Account. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 11/7/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]
